title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Weak to normal thunderstorms are expected today.

GNRL #1
E Czechia, SW Poland & NW Slovakia

Thunderstorms are expected in this area.
the main threats are:
- Severe winds
- Heavy rain

GNRL #2
NE Poland

Thunderstorms are expected in early morning of the 13th, as the thunderstorm system from the Baltics will arrive to Poland.

I sincerely apologise for the less detailed discussion today but i am tired.
